title: Consultation: Draft guidelines for Canadian drinking water quality, Chlorite and chlorate - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Draft guidelines for Canadian drinking water quality, Chlorite and chlorate

## Current status: Open
Opened on February 13, 2026 and will close to new input on April 14, 2026 .
Health Canada has drafted Guidelines for Canadian drinking water quality, Chlorite and chlorate . We're looking for feedback, in particular on the approach used to develop the guidelines and on the potential impacts on implementing them.

## Join in: How to participate
Send an email to water-consultations-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca with your ideas or comments to make yourself heard.
Send a letter with your ideas and input to the address in contact us below.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
We will engage with:
- federal, provincial and territorial regulatory and health protection agencies
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- non-governmental organizations

## Key questions for discussion
Your ideas and inputs are sought on the:
- potential impacts of implementation
We will use the information we gather from this consultation to revise the guidelines as needed.
Water and Air Quality Bureau Health Canada 219 Laurier Ave West Ottawa ON K1A 0K9 Email: water-consultations-eau@hc-sc.gc.ca
